channel.title: Knowledge Catalog on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Knowledge Catalog on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: Knowledge Catalog (formerly known as Dataplex) Source
item.description:
About

Knowledge Catalog is a unified, intelligent governance solution for data and AI assets in Google Cloud. Knowledge Catalog powers AI, analytics, and business intelligence at scale.

At the heart of these governance capabilities is a catalog that contains a centralized inventory of the data assets in your organization. Knowledge Catalog holds business, technical, and runtime metadata for all of your data. It helps you discover relationships and semantics in the metadata by applying artificial intelligence and machine learning.
